items.name: Perfectly Generic Object
items.description: A green cube with rounded corners and no other discernable features.
items.tagline: It's a perfectly generic object in all respects. You feel absolutely nothing. And that's the point.

items.name: Shard of Everything
items.description: A multicolored flashing shard of some glass-like material. Staring into it gives you nausea.
items.tagline: Every property, every purpose. Especially the ones you didn't ask for.

items.name: Rocket Pack
items.description: A red, bulky jetpack with a flame design decal on the back and black shoulder straps.
items.tagline: It's a jetpack. Use with caution, as it may cause you to fly into the sun or something.

items.name: Rocket Shoes
items.description: A pair of chunky red boots with flat, black toes, a flame design decal on the sides, and jets on the bottoms.
items.tagline: Jetpacks for your feet! Not approved by the FAA, but who cares about that? Not you, that's for sure.

items.name: Red Sucker
items.description: A large, bright red lollipop. Only one of it can exist at a time across all universes.
items.tagline: A large, bright red lollipop. Only one of it can exist at a time across all universes.

items.name: Green Sucker
items.description: A large, bright green lollipop. Only one of it can exist at a time across all universes.
items.tagline: A large, bright green lollipop. Only one of it can exist at a time across all universes.

items.name: Lollipop
items.description: A large lollipop with a paper stick and big swirl of candy on top.
items.tagline: It's just a lollipop. Maybe you should try OR instead of AND?

items.name: Spiral Sucker
items.description: A large lollipop with swirls of red and green.
items.tagline: A large lollipop with swirls of red and green. You are compelled to lick it....

items.name: Captchalogue Card
items.description: A large lollipop with swirls of red and green.
items.tagline: A card that can hold any item you captchalogue. Each item has a unique code that identifies it on the back.
